title: Urban Green Roof Incentive
summary: Tax credits for apartment buildings that install and maintain green roofs.
resultNote: Passed and published in state bulletin. Program opens Q3 2026.

title: Public Transport Late-Night Pilot
summary: Weekend bus and tram services extended by 2 hours in major cities.
resultNote: Approved as a 12-month pilot with monthly performance reviews.

title: Single-Use Plastic Ban in Open Markets
summary: Gradual ban on disposable plastic packaging for open-air market vendors.
resultNote: Rejected. Committee requested impact analysis for small vendors.

title: Digital Literacy for Seniors
summary: Free digital-skills workshops in local community centers for citizens 60+.
resultNote: Under committee review. Final vote expected in summer session.
